headline: Analyst says there is a divide in how Americans shop for Apparel & Footwear
summary: Investing.com -- Higher-income Americans are becoming increasingly important to apparel and footwear sales as widening economic inequality produces sharp differences in shopping frequency, price sensitivity, and technology adoption, Bernstein analyst Aneesha Sherman said.
